## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and green (`npm test` + `npm run test:integration`)
- [ ] Fail-closed preserved (no deny/error became an allow)
- [ ] No tool input (URLs/paths/commands) added to any deny reason
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or config changed
